violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Chipotle sauce which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per PIC, sauce was cooked the previous night. Sauce was observed at 50 degrees. Product was disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Marinated par-cooked beef was observed stored in a container not labeled that it was "par-cooked beef". According to the approved variance, chicken and beef must be labeled that it is par-cooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
